patient.query: Thanks, I appreciate that. It’s just... sometimes I feel like my feelings are too big to handle. Like, even if I know I shouldn't feel this way, it doesn’t change the fact that I do. I guess I just want to feel okay in my own skin, without the constant comparison to others. But, it feels so far away right now.

I want to feel okay in my own skin

It’s like I’m never good enough in my own eyes, and that constant feeling of inadequacy weighs me down. I just wish I could feel comfortable being myself without all those doubts creeping in.

I don’t know, I guess it just feels like there’s this weight that I can't shake off.

It feels like I have this wall up, and it’s difficult to let it down.
